message:
feat(tui): add TUI V3 config fields, enable new ftui features, and reformat screens

Introduce six new configuration knobs for TUI V3: effects toggle
(AM_TUI_EFFECTS), ambient mode off/subtle/full (AM_TUI_AMBIENT), debug
overlay (AM_TUI_DEBUG), export directory (AM_EXPORT_DIR), tree style
rounded/plain/bold/double/ascii (AM_TUI_TREE_STYLE), and theme selection
default/solarized/dracula/nord/gruvbox (AM_TUI_THEME). All are
env-overridable with validation and silent fallback to defaults, covered
by three new unit tests (tui_v3_defaults, tui_v3_from_env_overrides,
tui_v3_invalid_values_fall_back).

Enable diagram, forms, clipboard, image, and visual-fx features on
ftui-extras, plus debug-overlay and regex-search on ftui-widgets in
Cargo.toml workspace dependencies.

Apply rustfmt across 13 TUI screen files and tui_chrome.rs to normalize
style chains, function signatures, and vec literals to consistent
formatting conventions.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

@@ -2431,7 +2385,11 @@ mod tests {
         // Exactly at boundary: 60s ago
         let at_boundary = now - ACTIVE_THRESHOLD_US;
         let (_, color) = activity_indicator(now, at_boundary);
-        assert_eq!(color, activity_yellow(), "exactly 60s should be idle/yellow");
+        assert_eq!(
+            color,
+            activity_yellow(),
+            "exactly 60s should be idle/yellow"
+        );
         // 1us before boundary: 59.999999s ago
         let just_inside = now - ACTIVE_THRESHOLD_US + 1;
         let (_, color) = activity_indicator(now, just_inside);
